name: 59"x18.5" Modern Tripod Floor Lamp Natural - Threshold™: Linen Shade, Metal Body, ETL Listed, 3-Way Switch
description:
Make a stylish addition to your home with this Tripod Floor lamp from Threshold™. Set on a metal tripod base with wood veneer finish and crisscross design, this floor lamp has a drum-shaped shade covered in a white fabric for a sophisticated look that goes well with your modern and farmhouse-style home decor. Simply place it near your sofa in your living room or alongside an armchair in your reading nook to create a glowing space that's inviting and comfortable.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Overall Height: 59 inches
Lamp Shade diameter: 16.5 inches
Lamp Shade Height: 10.5 inches
Tripod Leg Piece 1 of 3 length: 19.62 inches
Tripod Leg Piece 2 of 3 length: 19.62 inches
Tripod Leg Piece 3 of 3 length: 10.82 inches
